ai_summary: Race Eco Chain Limited has invested INR 1.17 crore into its recycling subsidiary, Ganesha Recycling Chain Private Limited, through a rights issue, which maintains the parent company's 51% ownership. While framed as a business expansion, this cash infusion is directed towards a relatively new subsidiary (incorporated September 2024) for which no historical turnover or financial performance data is provided, making it difficult to assess the immediate impact or justification for this further investment.
